description: The 14K is a triad group based in Hong Kong but active internationally. It is the second largest triad group in the world with around 20,000 members split into thirty subgroups. Formed in 1945 by Kuomintang Lieutenant-General Kot Siu-wong in Guangzhou, China, as an anti-Communist action group, it relocated to Hong Kong in 1949. The group is heavily involved in drug trafficking, illegal gambling, money laundering, and other criminal activities.

country_links.context: The 14K resurfaced in Sydney in Australia.

country_links.evidence_quote: Authorities believe that Belgium now plays an equally important role. Heroin laboratories that were discovered in the Netherlands have been reassembled in Flanders, with strong bases in Brussels and Antwerp.
country_links.context: Belgium plays an equally important role as the Netherlands, with heroin laboratories in Flanders and bases in Brussels and Antwerp.

country_links.evidence_quote: The 14K became the main distributors of the opium grown by their allies in Burma, shipping the opium to Europe and North America...
country_links.context: The 14K became the main distributors of opium grown by their allies in Burma, shipping it to Europe and North America.
The 14K resurfaced in Vancouver, Calgary and Toronto in Canada.

country_links.evidence_quote: The 14K is among the leading triads in France, where it has cooperated with Turkish, Albanian and Nigerian crime groups in heroin trafficking.
country_links.context: The 14K is among the leading triads in France, cooperating with other crime groups in heroin trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: The first reported triad activity in Ireland came in July 1979 when the 14K attempted a takeover of a Dublin-based Chinese gang's protection rackets... Tony Lee, allegedly a high-ranking member of the 14K's Cork branch, was killed...
country_links.context: The 14K attempted a takeover of a Dublin-based Chinese gang's protection rackets and has a branch in Cork.

country_links.evidence_quote: The National Police Agency stated in 1997 that the 14K had been expanding its operations in Japan since the 1980s and had branches in Fukuoka, Osaka, Sapporo and Tokyo...
country_links.context: The 14K has branches in Fukuoka, Osaka, Sapporo and Tokyo, each with at least 1,000 members.

country_links.evidence_quote: In 1998, a gunman believed to be connected to the local 14K killed a Portuguese national and wounded another at a pavement café in Macau.
country_links.context: A gunman believed to be connected to the local 14K killed a Portuguese national in Macau.

country_links.evidence_quote: Intelligence reports from the Attorney General of Mexico and the Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency have indicated that the 14K triad is among the suppliers of raw materials used in the manufacturing of methamphetamine to the Sinaloa Cartel.
country_links.context: The 14K is among the suppliers of raw materials for methamphetamine to the Sinaloa Cartel.

country_links.evidence_quote: 14K has been connected to scam centers in Myanmar, financing the construction of the city of Shwe Kokko.
country_links.context: 14K has been connected to scam centers in Myanmar, financing the construction of Shwe Kokko.

country_links.evidence_quote: The 14K triad has been active in the Netherlands since as early as the 1970s... Dutch police authorities believe that the 14K took full control of heroin importation into the Benelux countries in 1987.
country_links.context: The 14K has been active in the Netherlands since the 1970s, controlling heroin importation into Benelux.

country_links.evidence_quote: New Zealand police have stated that the 14K is the most powerful Asian crime syndicate operating in the country. They are involved in the importation of pseudoephedrine...
country_links.context: New Zealand police state the 14K is the most powerful Asian crime syndicate operating in the country, involved in pseudoephedrine importation.

country_links.evidence_quote: The 14K triad has been involved in smuggling arms to Abu Sayyaf and has reportedly cooperated with the Islamic group in laundering and transmitting ransom money...
country_links.context: The 14K has been involved in smuggling arms to Abu Sayyaf and laundering ransom money.

country_links.evidence_quote: Two 14K groups, 14K-Hau and 14K-Ngai, are among seven Chinese criminal organizations operating in South Africa...
country_links.context: Two 14K groups operate in South Africa, specializing in extortion and abalone trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: The 14K has a branch in Spain, operating from Madrid.
country_links.context: The 14K has a branch in Spain, operating from Madrid.

country_links.evidence_quote: After the riot, the colonial government arrested over 10,000 14K members, with 600 of them being deported to Taiwan.
country_links.context: After the 1956 riots, 600 14K members were deported to Taiwan.

country_links.evidence_quote: The 14K is the largest Chinese crime syndicate operating in Thailand. In January 2000, a haul of 100 kilograms (220 pounds) of heroin bound for the United States confiscated during an operation in Bangkok was attributed to the 14K.
country_links.context: The 14K is the largest Chinese crime syndicate operating in Thailand, using Bangkok as a trafficking base.

country_links.evidence_quote: Since the crackdown in Macau, the 14K triad resurfaced in cities such as Los Angeles, San Francisco and Chicago in the United States...
country_links.context: The 14K resurfaced in cities such as Los Angeles, San Francisco and Chicago in the United States.
